title: Supply Chain Manager - Snapdeal Logistics - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Snapdeal Logistics - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Snapdeal Logistics! We are hiring a Supply Chain Manager for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Snapdeal Logistics:
Snapdeal Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Logistics!
